assertion_results.text: The plan references using entity/src/package_license.rs for the JOIN query rather than writing raw SQL or creating a new entity
assertion_results.evidence: The plan states it modifies the service to join 'through package_license entity'. The reuse analysis lists 'entity/src/package_license.rs' as REUSE DIRECTLY, described as 'imported for JOIN query, provides type-safe column references'.

assertion_results.text: The reuse analysis covers all 3 Reuse Candidates from the task description, explaining how each would be applied
assertion_results.evidence: The reuse analysis covers exactly 3 candidates: (1) common/src/db/query.rs::apply_filter — REUSE DIRECTLY for comma-separated parsing and SQL IN clause, (2) modules/fundamental/src/advisory/endpoints/list.rs — FOLLOW PATTERN for Query struct field pattern, handler wiring, and service integration, (3) entity/src/package_license.rs — REUSE DIRECTLY for JOIN query with type-safe column references. Each has a clear explanation of how it would be applied.
